name: Link Preview - Website Metadata API
description: Extract rich metadata from any URL. Returns Open Graph tags, Twitter Cards, favicons, RSS feeds, author info, and more. Fast response with 1-hour caching. Perfect for building link previews, social cards, and SEO tools.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL to extract metadata from

long_description:
## Overview

Extract rich metadata from any URL including Open Graph tags, Twitter Cards, favicons, RSS feeds, and author info. Fast responses with 1-hour caching. Perfect for building link previews, social sharing cards, and SEO tools.

## Key Features

- ✅ Open Graph and Twitter Card metadata extraction
- ✅ Favicon, RSS feed, and author detection
- ✅ Bulk preview for up to 10 URLs in a single request
- ✅ 1-hour smart caching for fast repeat requests
- ✅ CORS enabled for direct browser usage

## Use Cases

- **Chat Applications**: Generate rich link previews like Slack and Discord
- **Social Media Tools**: Preview how URLs will appear when shared
- **SEO Auditing**: Check Open Graph and meta tag implementation
- **Content Aggregators**: Extract titles, descriptions, and images from links
- **CMS Integrations**: Auto-populate link cards in blog posts and pages

## Quick Start

```
GET /preview?url=https://github.com
```

Returns JSON with `title`, `description`, `image`, `favicon`, `og_tags`, `twitter_card`, and more.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Requests/mo | Rate Limit |
|------|-------|-------------|------------|
| **Basic (FREE)** | $0 | 100 | 1/sec |
| Pro | $9.99 | 5,000 | 10/sec |
| Ultra | $29.99 | 25,000 | 50/sec |

Free tier includes all metadata extraction. No credit card required.
